source: Original plain-English notes on typical drying behavior of common building materials. Field observation, not a reproduction of any standard.

drywall.notes: Faster with airflow. Saturated drywall often replaced.

carpet_padding.notes: Padding usually replaced; carpet face dries faster than back.

hardwood_floor.notes: Bound water dries slowly; specialty drying often required.

plaster.notes: Low porosity; drying time depends on thickness and lath.

concrete_slab.notes: Bound moisture can persist for weeks; measure with calibrated meter.

framing_lumber.notes: Target moisture content below 16 percent for common framing.
